home.hero_text: In 2025 we reached our 85th represented residential complex. Over the last 14 years we have provided project management consultancy and feasibility studies for 41 residential complexes. In 21 years we have clad facades with carpentry at dozens of buildings, hundreds of houses and thousands of apartments. We currently have approximately 19 projects for sale.
home.despre_text: NEOFORT is a group of companies with over 21 years of experience, with activities related to the real estate and construction market. Our expertise covers project management consultancy, off-plan residential sales and supply of PVC and aluminium carpentry.
home.vanzare_text: Neofort IMO represents residential complexes under construction or in final stages, available for reservation or sale. Active portfolio: approximately 19 residential projects at various stages of development in Bucharest and the metropolitan area.
home.dezvoltare_text: Neofort NEW HOMES develops residential projects in central and ultra-central areas of Bucharest. For 2026 we intend to launch 2 more residential complexes in strategic partnerships.
home.tamplarie_text: Neofort BIZ is a regional supplier of PVC carpentry, aluminium carpentry, shading systems, nZEB systems, automation and carpentry accessories, with a history dating back to 2005. We have clad facades at dozens of apartment buildings and hundreds of houses across Romania.
